creator: assar@sics.se
text:
this panic was caused while running an electric fenced program under gdb.

Current directory is /usr/src/sys/compile/HUNAHPU/

Working directory /var/crash

(kgdb) exec-file kernel.9
(kgdb) core-file vmcore.9
SMP 2 cpus
IdlePTD 3489792
initial pcb at 2d3640
panicstr: page fault

Fix: 

no fix known :-(
How-To-Repeat: 
run a large program with efence for a while.
